title: EmberX Pack
description:
JOIN THE DISCORD!!
so many damn things i cant even list them😔
body:
```
This resource pack adds a bunch of custom weapons, items, and effects to make your gameplay more exciting:

Weapons & Combat

Bow (+ pulling stages)
Crossbow (+ pulling + arrow)
Arrow projectile made 3D
Swords (Netherite down to Iron)
Spears (Netherite down to Iron, + in-hand)
Mace
Mace (Breach)
Mace (Density)
Axes (Netherite down to Iron)

Armor

Netherite Armor (Down to Chainmail)
Elytra (+ broken)

Utilities

Ender Pearl
Golden Apple
Totem of Undying
Potion
Splash Potion
Wind Charge

Blocks/Entities

Purple Minecart (3D in Inventory)
Outlined Cobwebs (3D in Inventory)
End Crystals (3d in Inventory)
Respawn Anchor (3D when on ground)
Dark Red Glowstone
Red Obsidian
Purple and Red TNT
Low Fire (Grey)
Outlined Ores
Red Slime
Red Slime on Sticky Piston
```
